title: Tactical PDA - FTB quests new Book
description: 3D tablet for FTB Quests wich features animated and emissive textures, perfect for modern modpacks!
body:
![Modern and Efficient!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99b2e7e1e85acb0d206c4832ffbb58619e5f678a_0.webp)

FTB Quests (forge): [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge)

FTB Quests (fabric): [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-fabric)


this item replaces the "Book" item, with a modern tablet.


if you want to hold the PDA correctly, install the [Not enough animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) mod, then open the mod's config file and copy this code
```
  "holdingItems": [
    "minecraft:clock",
    "minecraft:recovery_compass",
    "minecraft:soul_lantern",
    "minecraft:compass",
    "minecraft:torch",
    "minecraft:lantern",
    "minecraft:soul_torch",
    "ftbquests:book"
  ],
```
